title: மினிமினி — Minmini (Fireflies) — EP02 Short
dialogue_updates: Updated with colloquial Tamil expressions + Tanglish

scenes.speaker: Arjun
scenes.note: ... after first Paaru = breath of awe

scenes.speaker: Kaavya
scenes.english_gloss: Catch them! I'm coming too! Run, run!

scenes.speaker: Arjun
scenes.dialogue_enhanced: [mischievously] Pudi-nga, pudi-nga! Bottle-la podunga! [curious] Paaru... EVVALAVU super-ah iruku!
scenes.english_gloss: Wait, wait! Put them in a bottle! Look how many there are!

scenes.speaker: Kaavya
scenes.dialogue_enhanced: [thoughtful] Arjun... [sighs] paaru. Bottle-la potathukapram… minmini poochiyoda velicham konjam... konjama koraiyithu.
scenes.english_gloss: Arjun... look. Since we put them in the bottle, the fireflies' light is getting dimmer and dimmer.
scenes.note: Two ... pauses = building sadness as she realizes the problem

scenes.speaker: Kaavya
scenes.dialogue_enhanced: [gently] Antha poochigaluku bottle-ulla adaipattu irukrathu... pidikala. [hopeful] Velila vitralama?
scenes.english_gloss: Those little lights don't like being trapped in the bottle. Should we let them go?
scenes.note: ... = pause before saying it's not good / [hopeful] = turning point

scenes.speaker: Kaavya
scenes.note: Whisper + THREE ... pauses = reverent, slow, like releasing them with love

scenes.speaker: Meenu
scenes.dialogue_enhanced: [softly amazed] Paaru, Kaavya akka... [sighs with awe] romba super-ah irukku. [thoughtful] Yarayum adaichi vekave kudathu
scenes.english_gloss: Look, Kaavya sister... it's so beautiful. You can't trap something wild.
scenes.note: ... = pause of wonder / First time Meenu speaks / Final wisdom about freedom
